description: Actionable remediation from the environment-health panel: guarded one-click fixes for the read-only drift signals — install a missing dep, run `compose update` when behind, and re-run `compose hooks install` to repair stale/missing hooks (overwriting a foreign hook stays confirm-gated). Reuses existing CLI/endpoint machinery and the same remote-auth posture as COMP-PARITY-3's read endpoint; no new lifecycle. Surfaced by COMP-PARITY-3 (shipped read-only by design).
